close_reason: All 8 E2E tests pass with nix prelude (verified 2026-01-16)
description:
After integrating nix prelude, verify all existing E2E tests still pass:

1. Run full E2E suite with prelude.strategy = 'nix'
2. Test fallback to prelude.strategy = 'bundled' still works
3. Add test case for prelude strategy switching if needed
title: Verify E2E tests pass with nix prelude
